bucket_name.description: Specifies the name of the storage bucket where objects are stored. Must be unique and comply with naming conventions.

cdn_policy.description: Defines the configuration settings for the Content Delivery Network (CDN), including cache behavior and policies.
cdn_policy.type: list(object({cache_mode: optional(string),client_ttl: optional(number),default_ttl: optional(number),max_ttl: optional(number),negative_caching: optional(bool),request_coalescing: optional(bool),serve_while_stale: optional(number),signed_url_cache_max_age_sec: optional(number),bypass_cache_on_request_headers: list(object({header_name: optional(string)})),cache_key_policy: list(object({include_http_headers: optional(list(string)),query_string_whitelist: optional(list(string))})),negative_caching_policy: list(object({code: optional(number),ttl: optional(number)}))}))

compression_mode.description: Indicates the compression mode used for the data, such as 'gzip'. Optimizes bandwidth but may increase CPU usage.

custom_response_headers.description: Lists custom headers to include in HTTP responses. Useful for security settings or custom metadata.

description.description: Provides a brief text description for the resource or service, aiding in identification and understanding of its purpose.

edge_security_policy.description: Specifies the security policy applied at the network edge, focusing on aspects like encryption and access controls.

enable_cdn.description: Determines whether the CDN feature is activated for improved content delivery performance.

name.description: Defines the name for the resource, ensuring it is human-readable and aligns with organizational naming standards.

project.description: Specifies the Google Cloud project associated with the resources, facilitating organization and billing.

timeouts.description: Configures the timeout durations for create, delete, and update operations, helping manage long-running tasks.
